caption: A man with grey hair and glasses, wearing a dark blue suit and a patterned tie, is speaking during a presentation. He is positioned in front of a blurred office background with glass partitions and a door handle. He gestures with his hands while speaking, moving his right arm and hand as he talks. At the bottom of the screen, a graphic overlay includes the "theCUBE" logo and the text "From the Javits Center, New York, NY". A "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo appears on the right side. The lower-left text changes between frames; it initially reads "MONGODB WORLD 2022 #MDW22 | #theCUBE", then switches to "DAVE VELLANTE Co-Founder & Co-CEO, SiliconANGLE Media, Inc. | @dvellante", and finally returns to "MONGODB WORLD 2022 #MDW22 | #theCUBE". The man's facial expressions and hand positions shift slightly throughout the sequence as he continues his address.
